conceptualization.theme_description: Bring intricate animal patterns to life

visual_composition.color_scheme: Earthy tones with splashes of vibrant jungle hues (emerald green, bright yellow, deep brown, azure blue)
focal_elements: Blended patterns of zebra stripes morphing into leopard spots
Tiger stripes flowing into scales reminiscent of a reptilian skin

secondary_elements.representation: Feathery textures overlapping with fur textures in soft, flowing, undefined strokes
Background composed of a loose, watery wash suggestive of natural environments like forests and rivers

conceptualization.intended_emotion: A connection to the wild, representing the fluidity and interconnectivity of nature through animal motifs

artistic_approach.techniques: Layering different densities of watercolor to create depth without hard lines; utilizing wet-on-wet techniques to let colors merge serendipitously

tools_used.purpose: Add detail without defining strict lines
